lines.lyrics: Kuch aap mein baat aisii hai

lines.lyrics: Dhoondhe se milte nahi hain hum

lines.lyrics: Bas aap hii aap baaki haii

lines.lyrics: Pal bhar naa doori sahein aap see
lines.indian: Pa Pa ma Ga Re Ga Re Sa ni dha ni ma.

lines.lyrics: Hum door hoke bhi paas hain
